mapper.sql: CASE WHEN p.STRING_VAL IS NOT NULL THEN p.STRING_VAL WHEN p.DATE_VAL IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR(p.DATE_VAL, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WHEN p.LONG_VAL IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR(p.LONG_VAL) WHEN p.DOUBLE_VAL IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR(p.DOUBLE_VAL) ELSE NULL END

sql.if: AND ( p.STRING_VAL LIKE '%' || #{parameterValue} || '%' OR TO_CHAR(p.DATE_VAL, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') LIKE '%' || #{parameterValue} || '%' OR TO_CHAR(p.LONG_VAL) LIKE '%' || #{parameterValue} || '%' OR TO_CHAR(p.DOUBLE_VAL) LIKE '%' || #{parameterValue} || '%' )

mapper.select:
SELECT p.JOB_EXECUTION_ID, ji.JOB_NAME, p.KEY_NAME AS PARAMETER_NAME, p.TYPE_CD AS PARAMETER_TYPE, AS PARAMETER_VALUE, p.IDENTIFYING FROM BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION_PARAMS p JOIN BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION je ON p.JOB_EXECUTION_ID = je.JOB_EXECUTION_ID JOIN BATCH_JOB_INSTANCE ji ON je.JOB_INSTANCE_ID = ji.JOB_INSTANCE_ID WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY p.JOB_EXECUTION_ID DESC, p.KEY_NAME ASC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION_PARAMS p JOIN BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION je ON p.JOB_EXECUTION_ID = je.JOB_EXECUTION_ID JOIN BATCH_JOB_INSTANCE ji ON je.JOB_INSTANCE_ID = ji.JOB_INSTANCE_ID WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT p.JOB_EXECUTION_ID, ji.JOB_NAME, p.KEY_NAME AS PARAMETER_NAME, p.TYPE_CD AS PARAMETER_TYPE, AS PARAMETER_VALUE, p.IDENTIFYING FROM BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION_PARAMS p JOIN BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION je ON p.JOB_EXECUTION_ID = je.JOB_EXECUTION_ID JOIN BATCH_JOB_INSTANCE ji ON je.JOB_INSTANCE_ID = ji.JOB_INSTANCE_ID WHERE p.JOB_EXECUTION_ID = #{jobExecutionId} ORDER BY p.KEY_NAME ASC

SELECT p.JOB_EXECUTION_ID, ji.JOB_NAME, p.PARAMETER_NAME, p.PARAMETER_TYPE, p.PARAMETER_VALUE, p.IDENTIFYING FROM BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION_PARAMS p JOIN BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION je ON p.JOB_EXECUTION_ID = je.JOB_EXECUTION_ID JOIN BATCH_JOB_INSTANCE ji ON je.JOB_INSTANCE_ID = ji.JOB_INSTANCE_ID WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY p.JOB_EXECUTION_ID DESC, p.PARAMETER_NAME ASC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION_PARAMS p JOIN BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION je ON p.JOB_EXECUTION_ID = je.JOB_EXECUTION_ID JOIN BATCH_JOB_INSTANCE ji ON je.JOB_INSTANCE_ID = ji.JOB_INSTANCE_ID WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT p.JOB_EXECUTION_ID, ji.JOB_NAME, p.PARAMETER_NAME, p.PARAMETER_TYPE, p.PARAMETER_VALUE, p.IDENTIFYING FROM BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION_PARAMS p JOIN BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION je ON p.JOB_EXECUTION_ID = je.JOB_EXECUTION_ID JOIN BATCH_JOB_INSTANCE ji ON je.JOB_INSTANCE_ID = ji.JOB_INSTANCE_ID WHERE p.JOB_EXECUTION_ID = #{jobExecutionId} ORDER BY p.PARAMETER_NAME ASC
